fields.name: input_parameters
fields.documentation: Calculator-specific input parameters. The concrete shape is determined by the calculator named in the inherited app.app_name field; the abstract calculator base does not constrain the contents. Placement is `concrete_class`: this field lives in the property block of the concrete calculator subclass (e.g., `simple_calc.input_parameters`, `tuningcurve_calc.input_parameters`), not in a `calculator` block, and the abstract `calculator` class contributes no property block to instance bodies. See V_gamma_SPEC.md "Field placement" under "Field Definition Object".
